textByHash.6529fed2eb8ab2914bc90468dfff10ef5ba40316: Hello. What can I do for you?
textByHash.85596b0ab3145cc26a99dfd946b1e75809594dbd: It depends on whether you like kebabs or not.
textByHash.c7b3bfc5d736d3c9a4809b3add6690391605a646: Seeing as I'm in the kebab construction industry, I mainly help people in need of a kebab.
textByHash.a3c3661deb4723d00f4ac0179e65a987ff4dac6a: I offer two different types of kebabs: the standard run- of-the-mill kebab seen throughout Gielinor and enjoyed by many an intoxicated dwarf, and my speciality, the extra-hot kebab. So which shall it be?
textByHash.fa21e9cd9a65d3cab283db36b1132bd71984f99d: That will be three gold coins.
textByHash.95a446e9e46949e3e3643bcf83638312633b7ad5: Is there anything else I can do for you?
textByHash.085dcf42103d2e875df72f80cd60b28b22d13850: Come back soon, I could do with a few more customers.
textByHash.0c60f3b9ab8f090763158742a9bed5059684f439: One super kebab coming up! Be careful, they really are as hot as they're made out to be.
textByHash.b1bd387380626885fb244300b4d5b4f239a70cbb: Well, that depends. What do you intend to do with it?
textByHash.d6c764c4f46f11254555cc068105e8cb0ce668b0: But then what do you want it for?
textByHash.9432dd47707f599bcaede0628d2f1cd4ac738f48: You're not going to put it in Drunken Ali's drink, are you? That's what happened the last time I gave someone the sauce.
textByHash.cf4741aed9814b4be376ac157297a650597dbf7e: Just be careful with it, it's potent enough to give a camel the runs.
textByHash.d5e88168e669be40f2bcdf369df303596a1afb24: If I told you that I would have to kill you. Kebab construction is a cut-throat industry. The extra-hot kebab gives me my competitive edge and if I were to divulge my secrets to every passing adventurer, I'd
textByHash.3bf25923dc4ea9e1a8ed3ec0bd972418189c52aa: Shh! Keep your voice down. You should have told me you were from the union.
textByHash.0a5c82207043ca34f485f0c3be6705bec21b5f2b: If information is what you need, there are many better people to ask than myself who could help you. One of the town's street urchins or perhaps the local drunk. I may be many things to many different people, but a
textByHash.2d27127a382df9a274289420d5353865c38ccefa: I need you to answer this for me.
